title: AgentLoopDecisionEnvelope
description: Machine envelope for planner-loop semantic decisions. It records whether the planner's first actionable step is to respond, clarify, call a capability, or synthesize an answer. Runtime must not parse user natural-language text to populate this shape.

initial_hint_ref.description: Machine ref for the pre-agent first-layer hint. This is an initial hint, not the semantic authority.

semantic_authority.description: Layer that owns the semantic decision envelope.

fallback_gate_policy.description: Pre-agent direct-answer gate policy after planner-loop migration.

reason_code.description: Stable machine reason code for the shadow decision.

validation_reason_code.description: Stable machine reason code produced by the shadow decision validator.

capability_ref.description: Capability, tool, or skill ref selected by the first planner action.
